# Vendored: GodotPrompter

These Godot 4.x skills are vendored verbatim from **jame581/GodotPrompter**
(https://github.com/jame581/GodotPrompter), MIT License — see `LICENSE`.

game-build-team's `install-deps.sh` copies the subset its agents load into the
target project's `.claude/skills/`. We ship them here so a run works offline and
is pinned to a known-good version. Re-sync: re-clone upstream into this dir.
